Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Engineer role at RateS. Your focus on maintaining testing frameworks and improving efficiency through new tools aligns perfectly with my background in software automation and quality assurance.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, where I also redesigned the software installation process. It used to take about 2 days to deploy. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. This mindset of optimizing manual processes is exactly what I want to apply to your testing pipelines.

To manage my own projects, I built a custom pipeline using n8n and AI agents that scrapes data and monitors system health daily. I am also comfortable with React and PostgreSQL through my platform ValoFenua, which helps me understand the full-stack architecture I would be testing.

I am completing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I follow RateS's growth in the social commerce space and look forward to helping ensure your platform remains reliable as you scale.
